feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP_trial 2022 HDB start problems: ARM64
entry.content:
Hello

I'm trying to run the ABAP 2022 trial, (https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial), on a windows ARM64 machine using WSL2. Anyone manage this successfully? 

I get the following error in nameserver_vhcala4hci.30201.000.trc:

[1980]{-1}[-1/-1] 2025-05-30 14:42:07.142187 i FileIO FileStatistics.cpp(00520) : FileFactoryConfiguration::initial(path="/hana/log/HDB/mnt00001/hdb00001/"[LOG], async_write_submit_active=on,async_write_submit_blocks=all,async_read_submit=on,num_submit_queues=1,num_completion_queues=1,size_kernel_io_queue=512,max_parallel_io_requests=64,min_submit_batch_size=16,max_submit_batch_size=64)
[1980]{-1}[-1/-1] 2025-05-30 14:42:07.144227 i FileIO FileStatistics.cpp(01392) : SubmitQueueConfiguration::initial(path="/hana/log/HDB/mnt00001/hdb00001/"[LOG], num_submit_queues=1,size_kernel_io_queue=512,max_parallel_io_requests=64,min_submit_batch_size=16,max_submit_batch_size=64)
[1980]{-1}[-1/-1] 2025-05-30 14:42:07.146082 e FileIO LocalFileCompletionThread.cpp(00523) : NOTE: One reason for failed io_setup might be that kernel parameter aio_max_nr is too low.
[1980]{-1}[-1/-1] 2025-05-30 14:42:07.149912 f PersistenceLayer PersistenceController.cpp(00787) : startup failed exception 1: no.2000009 (Basis/IO/FileAccess/impl/LocalFileCompletionThread.cpp:524) TID: 1980
Error calling io_setup, rc=38: Function not implemented
exception throw location:
0: 0x00002aaada94e35c in FileAccess::LocalFileCompletionThreadHandler::initCompletionPort(unsigned short) [clone .constprop.0]+0x1a8 at Basis/IO/FileAccess/impl/LocalFileCompletionThread.cpp:524 (libhdbbasis.so)
1: 0x00002aaada5c845c in FileAccess::LocalFileCompletionThreadHandler::createThread(Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&, ltt::basic_string<char, ltt::char_traits<char>, 39ul> const&, FileAccess::PathWrapper const&, FileAccess::FileFactory::Usage const&, unsigned int, unsigned short)+0x28 at Basis/IO/FileAccess/impl/LocalFileCompletionThread.cpp:499 (libhdbbasis.so)
2: 0x00002aaada5c9303 in FileAccess::LocalFileFactory::init(Configuration::ConfigurationHandler&)+0x6f0 at Basis/IO/FileAccess/spi/IoThread.hpp:214 (libhdbbasis.so)

HDB does not start:

HDB: starting

30.05.2025 14:41:44
Start
OK

30.05.2025 14:42:18
StartWait
FAIL: process hdbdaemon HDB Daemon not running
HDB: the start command failed, exit code=2
The service HDB has failed to start and initialization is blocked until the problem is resolved
You can try your luck 10 times until initialization is terminated
Hint: docker containers can be joined by: docker exec -it <name> bash
Hint: Container must have at least 16GB RAM available
Hint: Container must have at least 70GB DISK free
Hit Return to continue

 

Memory
:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB02/vhcala4hci/trace # free -h
total used free shared buff/cache available
Mem: 27Gi 1.3Gi 25Gi 100Mi 454Mi 26Gi
Swap: 170Gi 0B 170Gi
Disk
:/usr/sap/HDB/HDB02/vhcala4hci/trace # df -h
Filesystem Size Used Avail Use% Mounted on
overlay    1007G 76G 881G 8% /
tmpfs        64M 0    64M 0% /dev
tmpfs        14G 0    14G 0% /sys/fs/cgroup
shm          64M 0    64M 0% /dev/shm
/dev/sdd   1007G 76G 881G 8% /etc/hosts
tmpfs        14G 0    14G 0% /proc/acpi
tmpfs        14G 0    14G 0% /sys/firmware

WSL
wsl -v
WSL version: 2.4.13.0
Kernel version: 5.15.167.4-1
WSLg version: 1.0.65
MSRDC version: 1.2.5716
Direct3D version: 1.611.1-81528511
DXCore version: 10.0.26100.1-240331-1435.ge-release
Windows version: 10.0.26100.4061

 

Any insights much appreciated.

Thanks,
Helios.

entry.title: How to add custom fields in Long Term Supplier Declaration Inbound Fiori app in SAP GTS
entry.content:
Hi ,

In SAP GTS , there are no CFL to add custom fields to standard apps . Can you please guide step by step how to add custom fields like producer code and net cost to Long Term Supplier Declaration Inbound Standard Fiori APP .

Also if standard fiori app needs to be copied to custom fiori app , what are the ABAP required changes to be done for custom fiori app.

Detailed Explanation with Example would be appreciated .

Regards,

SN

SAP Global Trade Services  @SAP  SAP Fiori OData

entry.title: Logon sicf
entry.content:
Hello. I need to configure the login in SICF so that the URL link automatically enters. Could someone help me?

Thank you.

entry.title: PO change in SAP
entry.content:
Hello,

I have two different PO types which is interlinked independently. PO1 changes needs to update PO2 via idoc( ORDCHG or PORDCH) with same SAP system/client.

How to create outbound change idoc from PO1 and create inbound change idoc into PO2 in same SAP system?

entry.title: Extend CDS View , Redefine ODATA and Enhance BOBF Class to add custom fields in Standard Fiori apps.
entry.content:
How to Extend CDS View with Metadata Extension , Redefine ODATA service and Enhance BOBF class to add custom fields to standard Fiori App in SAP GTS.

Explain with step by step process using any example.

 

SAP Global Trade Services  OData  ABAP Development 

@SAP @sapcommunity @GTS @ABAP

entry.title: ABAP - Simple Transformation : Deserialization and optional tags ?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working on an XML transformation (STRANS - Simple Transformation type).
I'm having a few problems with a case that seemed simple to me ...

My XML is (simplified version, because the initial file can contain thousands of lines) :

<Invoice>
<ID>FB25-05-028</ID>
<IssueDate>2025-05-28</IssueDate>
<DueDate>2025-06-27</DueDate>
<InvoiceTypeCode listID="UNCL1001">380</InvoiceTypeCode>
<DocumentCurrencyCode listID="ISO4217">EUR</DocumentCurrencyCode>
<BillingReference>
<InvoiceDocumentReference>
<ID>TEST123</ID>
</InvoiceDocumentReference>
</BillingReference>
...
</Invoice>

For example, I just need to retrieve the <ID>, the <IssueDate> and the <ID> in <BillingReference>.
No problem with that.

The problem is that in some cases the <BillingReference> tag is not present, it's [0..1].
So her children are not always present.

How do you indicate in the ST that this tag <BillingReference> is optional?

My ST looks like :

<?sap.transform simple?>
<tt:transform xmlns:tt="http://www.sap.com/transformation-templates">

  <tt:root name="INVOICE"/>

  <tt:template>
    <Invoice tt:extensible="deep-dynamic">

      <ID tt:value-ref="INVOICE.ID"/>
	  <IssueDate tt:value-ref="INVOICE.ISSUEDATE"/>

      <tt:d-cond>
        <BillingReference>
          <InvoiceDocumentReference>
            <ID tt:value-ref="INVOICE.BILLINGREFERENCE_ID"/>
          </InvoiceDocumentReference>
        </BillingReference>
      </tt:d-cond>

    </Invoice>
  </tt:template>

</tt:transform>

With this version, I never go into <BillingReference>.

I tried using a d-cond like this: 

<tt:d-cond check="exist(INVOICE.BILLINGREFERENCE_ID)">

I've tried several solutions but nothing has worked.

My example is intentionally simplified.
I'm going to come across this kind of problem several times in the ST.

My XML sometimes has thousands of <tags>, so starting to list all the <tags> in the ST using SKIP statement isn't an option.

I hope I've just missed the simple solution to this problem.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Enhancing Maintenance Order and Task List Structure Lists with additional field
entry.content:
We have a requirement to enhance both the Change Maintenance Order (W0017) and Change Maintenance Task List (W0021) apps' Materials Structure lists with an additional column displaying Material Type data. We have identified eams3_s_sp_struct_list as the underlying structure for the displayed list that will need to be extended, however it is currently restricted to be not extensible and therefore any changes would not be clean core compliant. Please confirm that altering the Structure Lists in this way is a product gap and please indicate when this structure will have a clean core compliant method of alteration.

  1. Open Fiori launchpad
  2. Navigate to either Change Maintenance Order (W0017) or Change Maintenance Task List (W0021)
  3. Open the "Operation Data" Tab
  4. Open the "Materials" Tab
  5. Open the "+ Select from Structure List" button
  6. Items are displayed, Material type, if relevant, is required to be displayed

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Try to change generated dynpro - changes do not apply
entry.content:
I have a dynpro that has been generated from a customizing view. It contains two long fields which I wanted to shorten visually. So I reduced the visible length and set the field to "scrollable". I did this hundreds of times before in other generated Dynpros.

In this case, the changes do not apply - the fields remain with their original length on the dynpro.

In a copied version of the dynpro, everything works out fine:

 

Is there maybe some cache I should clear?

entry.title: ABAP in the Cloud: Debugging authorization
entry.content:
Dear all, 

i am using ABAP Cloud enviroment where i have developed a RAP Service. For some testing reasons i am debugging the service with EXTERNAL user in ADT. That works just fine. The issue what i have is that i am not authorized to change the variables under the debugger. 

My questions are: 

- How can i run some kind of authorization trace to check what is missing?

- Do somebody knows already a role which allows that?

I have already the proper DEVELOPER role assigned which was created by SAP. 

Anyone faced this issue? 

Thanks, 

Henryk

entry.title: Why Sap lock doesn't release automatically?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Why sap lock doesn't release automaticalluy after program executing?
It's released agter if i press on of the 'Back' bution on the toolbar on write screen.
Why so? Is it should released after program execution?

REPORT  zva_ex50.
data : wa_asset type anla.

select single * from anla
  into wa_asset
  where bukrs = 1000
  and   anln1 = '000000040000'.


CALL FUNCTION 'ENQUEUE_EANLA'
 EXPORTING
   MODE_ANLA            = 'E'
   MANDT                = SY-MANDT
   BUKRS                = wa_asset-bukrs
   ANLN1                = wa_asset-anln1
   ANLN2                = wa_asset-anln2
   X_BUKRS              = 'X'
   X_ANLN1              = 'X'
   X_ANLN2              = 'X'
   _SCOPE               = '3'
   _WAIT                = ' '
   _COLLECT             = ' '
 EXCEPTIONS
   FOREIGN_LOCK         = 1
   SYSTEM_FAILURE       = 2
   OTHERS               = 3
          .
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
* MESSAGE ID SY-MSGID TYPE SY-MSGTY NUMBER SY-MSGNO
*         WITH SY-MSGV1 SY-MSGV2 SY-MSGV3 SY-MSGV4.
else.
  perform assert_change.
  write '123'.
ENDIF.
form assert_change.
data : lt_ret type bapiret2,
       lgd    type bapi1022_feglg001,
       lgdx   type bapi1022_feglg001x.
lgd-descript = 'Test 2'.
lgdx-descript = 'X'.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_FIXEDASSET_CHANGE'
  EXPORTING
    companycode                = wa_asset-bukrs
    asset                      = wa_asset-anln1
    subnumber                  = wa_asset-anln2
   GENERALDATA                = lgd
   GENERALDATAX               = lgdx
 IMPORTING
   RETURN                     = lt_ret.

commit work and WAIT.
endform.

entry.title: How to send multiple default values for a smart filter property from SAP ABAP OData?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send multiple default values for a smart filter property maintained in UI from SAP ABAP OData service DEFINE method. By using set_default_value I could send only one default value.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to add task to an existing transport request using program
entry.content:
PARAMETERS: p_TR TYPE trkorr OBLIGATORY. // Take TR as parameter

 

DATA: lt_authorlist TYPE trwbo_users,

lt_return TYPE e070-trkorr,

ls_return TYPE bapiret2,

lv_new_task TYPE trkorr. // Variable to take task

 

START-OF-SELECTION.

 

 

CALL FUNCTION 'TRINT_INSERT_NEW_COMM'

EXPORTING

wi_kurztext = 'New Task' // Description if creating TR

wi_trfunction = 'S' // 'S' to create task under TR

iv_username = sy-uname // System Username

wi_strkorr = p_TR // Export TR value to FM

IMPORTING

we_trkorr = lv_new_task // Import task to the variable

EXCEPTIONS

no_systemname = 1

no_systemtype = 2

no_authorization = 3

db_access_error = 4

file_access_error = 5

enqueue_error = 6

number_range_full = 7

invalid_input = 8

OTHERS = 9.

IF sy-subrc = 0.

WRITE: / ' New task created under TR:', p_TR,

/ ' Task number:', lv_new_task.

ELSE.

WRITE: / 'Failed to create task. '.

ENDIF.

*********************************************************************************
Type of request/task
Domain : TRFUNCTION
K : Workbench Request
W : Customizing Request
S : Development/Correction
Q : Customizing Task

entry.title: S/4HANA Readiness Check for an enhancement running into "SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1P/ is in scope..."
entry.content:
Hi All!

I'm currently involved with a Brownfield conversion of our SAP-system (see here and here for context) and am in the process to put together ATC-results based on the S4HANA_READINESS_2023 check variant. This is happening in a recently converted development system which is now on SAP_BASIS 758 SP2 and which started live as a copy from a NW750 EHP8 development system. I'm getting ATC results for most of our custom objects but am running into issues for our large enhancement of SAPMV45A where I get tool failure "The SAP-owned namespace /0SJ1P/ is in scope. SAP objects cannot be checked in this case."

I already searched for mentions of this error and happened upon @EnnoWulff's question with @BjörnJüliger's detailed response where the only difference seems to be that Enno had "/0SJ1G/" in the message while for me it's "/0SJ1P/".

I already ran the report SATC_AC_INIT_NAMESPACE_REG mentioned in Note 3063877 but this particular namespace isn't listed there. In table TRNSPACE the namespace is listed with a "P" but that is also the case in the counterpart dev system which is still on NW750. When I run a remote S/4HANA_READINESS_2023 check in that system I do get a long list of findings (as expected) and I expect to see the same issues identified in the new S/4HANA system.

Our enhancement has always been in a Z-package.

What else can I check on my own? Or is it better to create on OSS incident right away with information based on the above?

Thanks much and Cheers

Bärbel

P.S.: please ignore the formatting which I have no means to correct at the moment but which has already been mentioned in comments to the blog post about the new "Glow" design for SAP Community.

entry.title: ABAP for Cloud Development - ABAP Push Channel Applications
entry.content:
Latest SAP Documentation shows how to create ABAP Push Channel Applications. However, object type SAMC is not supported in ABAP Cloud so this cannot be used while building clean core add-ons (ABAP for Cloud Development packages).

An SAP developer tutorial on AMC + ABAP Daemons almost matched our use-case, but the tutorial relies on an external  MQTT Broker (HiveMQ). While developing installable on-prem, clean-core ABAP add-ons, it is not logical to use an external MQTT Broker. I believe this will also be an issue for anyone running SAP BTP ABAP Environment that would like to make use of ABAP message channels.  

Is this a reasonable SAP Influence request and would there be some support from others in community for this functionality within ABAP Cloud? Please let me know if there is any other reasonable way to integrate AMC Applications with the ABAP for Cloud Development (without using an external message broker).

__PRESENT__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Is there any simple XCO code to write Excel file from internal table and vice versa?
entry.content:
I'm looking for a very simple program which demonstrates XCO to read or write an Excel file, which is short and that I can understand and test immediately.

What I have found:

  • SAP Library, great explanations but a little work is needed to get a working code.
    • https://help.sap.com/docs/search?q=XLSX+Read+Access
    • https://help.sap.com/docs/search?q=XLSX+Write+Access
  • Software Heroes, same remark
    • ABAP - XCO Excel

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: BADI ? to add Pricing Condition records in a PO
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are on S4 Public Cloud and have a business scenario where PO get automatically created upon SalesOrder(SO) creation . In the SO, we manually add custon pricing condition types and are hoping to have these condition types automatically flow into associated PO's. We understand from SAP that custom condition types will NOT flow automatically from SO to PO using config in CBC.

So we are looking at options around how to acheive it using KeyUser/Developer Extensibility but so far I have not come across a BADI in MM area which allows "Addition" of new condition type records. Essentially any Pricing BADI which has conditionType field and its related attributes in Change mode would likely help.

Has anyone come across a similar scenario or aware of a BADI that allows "addition" of new condition type records to a PO.

Appreciate any help.

 

Thanks

RK

entry.title: How to Connect Eclipse with Git or abapGit and Push ABAP Code to GitHub for ABAP Cloud project
entry.content:
I'm working on an ABAP development project and would like to integrate version control using GitHub.

I’m specifically looking to push ABAP code to GitHub directly from Eclipse using either Git or the abapGit plugin.

What I've done so far:

  • Installed Egit plugin in Eclipse via the Marketplace.

  • Installed the abapGit plugin in Eclipse following the SAP Developers guide:
    https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-install-abapgit-plugin.html

I'm trying to understand:

  • Can I push ABAP code directly from Eclipse ADT to GitHub?

  • If yes, what are the exact steps to do this using either Git or abapGit in Eclipse?

  • If not, what is the recommended way to use GitHub for ABAP version control (especially in ABAP cloud  project)?

entry.title: Modifying RFPOSXEXT Structure Fields in FBL3N Using BTE
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently working on a requirement to enhance the FBL3N report by populating values for fields such as LIFNR and EBELN.

During our analysis and after reviewing several SAP Community blogs, we found that BTE 00001650 is a viable solution for this enhancement. However, we have encountered the following issues:

  1. The standard structure RFPOSXEXT already contains the fields U_LIFNR and U_EBELN. But upon debugging BTE 00001650, we observed that these fields are not present in the internal tables I_POSTAB and E_POSTAB.

  2. To overcome this, we appended the required fields to the structures RFPOS and RFPOSX and then executed the report RFPOSXEXTEND. As a result, the structure RFPOSXEXT was updated correctly, and we were able to populate LIFNR and EBELN in the BTE logic, which were displayed as additional columns in the FBL3N output.

  3. Our main requirement is to populate these values specifically for documents with type 'RE', where currently these fields appear blank.

  4. We would like to confirm whether it is technically possible to populate values in the existing standard fields U_LIFNR and U_EBELN instead of creating and using new custom fields for this purpose.

We would appreciate your guidance or suggestions on how best to handle this scenario.

entry.title: Additional Binding annotation not working for consumption valuehepdefinition
entry.content:
I am trying to use a search help with values being filtered on an input local field value.

 

@ui.selectionField: [{position: 20}]

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 20, label: 'Version' }]

@ui.identification: [{ position: 20, label: 'Version' }]

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [

{ entity:{ element: 'Version',

name: 'ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH' } },

 

{ additionalBinding: [{ localElement: 'Aadhar',

element: 'AadharID',

usage: #FILTER_AND_RESULT }] }

]

Version;

 

------

 

The Search Help CDS looks like as below-

 

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

@ObjectModel.usageType:{

serviceQuality: #X,

sizeCategory: #S,

dataClass: #MIXED

}

 

@search.searchable: true

define view entity ZPSBC_ITEMX_SH as select distinct from zpsb_item

{

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Aadhar ID'

key aadhar as AadharID,

 

@search.defaultSearchElement: true

@search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.9

@EndUserText.label: 'Version of the ID'

Key version as Version

}

 

group by

aadhar,

version

-------

I am checking the SAP documentation and I believe I have done it right but stil

the value is not filtered. I need help please. I am finding this ABAP RAP trial

totally junk, sometimes despite the right code some feature won't work then wait

next day it starts working. This is science right not some dark magic. Why should

it behave like this? Please help me with this annotation and if I am doing wrong.

entry.title: Instance Memory in ABAP for Cloud Development
entry.content:
I have not been able to find a way to retain Static Class attributes in instance memory between SAPUI5 apps and the ABAP backend. We're currently on a S/4 HANA on-premise 2023 FSP 02 system. On each call to the ABAP backend from SAPUI5, all of my static class attributes are cleared. Nothing is kept in ABAP memory between calls the ABAP backend from my UI5 apps. 

How can we retain ABAP class instances in memory while re-designing our UI to run on SAPUI5? I hope that I am missing a setting to keep an ABAP internal session memory alive. If not, this is a really big issue for partners and customers that cannot leverage there instanciated instances without having to rebuild from the DB on every call to the ABAP Server. SAPUI5 apps need to be able to leverage instantiated classes in the ABAP server.

oData services have become the primary bridge between frontend and backend apps. However, OData can't support ABAP object references, so we need to get a little more creative on how to make the two technologies work together:

Attempt 1 - Custom CDS entities + ABAP data store. Here we set up a data store as a singleon to try to take advantage of static attribute - FAILED

class ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE definition
  public
  final
  create public .

public section.

  class-methods GET_OBJECT
    returning
      value(RO_DATA_STORE) type ref to ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE .
  methods GET_FOO_OBJECT
    returning
      value(RO_FOO) type ref to ZCL_FOO.
  methods SET_FOO_OBJECT
    importing
      !IO_FOO type ref to ZCL_FOO .
  METHODS get_count
      RETURNING
        VALUE(rv_count) TYPE int4.
    METHODS set_count
      IMPORTING
        iv_count TYPE int4.
  PROTECTED SECTION.
private section.

  class-data MO_DATA_STORE type ref to ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE .
  DATA MO_FOO type ref to ZCL_FOO .
  DATA mv_count TYPE int4.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS ZCL_LE_DATA_STORE IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD get_object.
    IF zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store IS NOT BOUND.
      CREATE OBJECT zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store.
    ENDIF.
    ro_data_store = zcl_le_data_store=>mo_data_store.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_count.
    rv_count = mv_count.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD set_count.
    mv_count = iv_count.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD GET_FOO_OBJECT.
    ro_foo = mo_foo.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD SET_FOO_OBJECT.
    mo_foo = io_foo.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
    TRY.
        DATA(lo_data_store) = zcl_le_data_store=>get_object(  ).
        DATA(lv_count) = lo_data_store->get_count(  ).
        lv_count += 1.
        lo_data_store->set_count( lv_count ).

        "Required calls for if_rap_query_provider interface usage
        DATA(lv_top)     = io_request->get_paging( )->get_page_size( ).
        DATA(lv_skip)    = io_request->get_paging( )->get_offset( ).
        DATA(lt_fields)  = io_request->get_requested_elements( ).
        DATA(lt_sort)    = io_request->get_sort_elements( ).

        DATA(lt_filter_conds) = io_request->get_filter( )->get_as_ranges( ). "       get_filter_conditions( ).
        DATA lt_data TYPE ty_web_api_t.
        io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_data ) ).
        io_response->set_data( lt_data ).

      CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(exception).
        DATA(exception_message) = cl_message_helper=>get_latest_t100_exception( exception )->if_message~get_longtext( ).
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.

The get data store method is returning an unbound instance on each call to if_rap_query_provider.

 

Attempt 2 - ABAP Push Channels - FAILED

I extended Gregor's ABAP push channel example to allow PCP messaging between the SAPUI5 app and the ABAP server. Unfortanately,  the data store static attributes do not retain instance memory over ABAP message Channels. The results are the same as attempt #1.

To add insult to injury, when moving this approach from Z-space to a ABAP Cloud, SAP ABAP Messaging Channel Application (t-code SAPC) are not supported in ABAP Cloud. I created another Tech Q&A post on this specific issue here.
  

 

 

CLASS zcl_apc_wsp_ext_zapc_echo DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  INHERITING FROM cl_apc_wsp_ext_stateless_pcp_b
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_message
        REDEFINITION .
    METHODS if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_start
        REDEFINITION .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
private section.

  class-methods PREPARE_MESSAGE_FOR_UI
    importing
      !IV_TEXT type STRING
    returning
      value(RV_TEXT) type STRING .

ENDCLASS.



CLASS ZCL_APC_WSP_EXT_ZAPC_ECHO IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_message.
    DATA: lo_producer TYPE REF TO cl_amc_message_type_pcp.
    DATA: lt_fields          TYPE pcp_fields.
    DATA lt_foo TYPE zcl_foo=>ty_fo_tab.

    TRY.
*       retrieve the text message
        i_message->get_fields( CHANGING c_fields = lt_fields ).
        lo_producer ?= cl_amc_channel_manager=>create_message_producer(
          i_application_id = 'ZAMC_ECHO'
          i_channel_id     = '/echo' ).

        DATA lo_foo TYPE REF TO zcl_foo.

        READ TABLE lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_foo_guid) WITH KEY name = 'foo_guid'.
        IF sy-subrc NE 0.
          "Raise exception
        ENDIF.




        """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""
        TRY.
            READ TABLE lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_fields) WITH KEY name = 'operation'.
            DATA(lv_message) = i_message->get_text( ).
            data lo_data_store TYPE REF TO zcl_le_data_store.
            lo_foo = zcl_le_data_store=>get_foo_object( ).
            IF lo_foo IS NOT BOUND.
                "Object memory not working, rebuild from DB :(
                lo_foo = zcl_foo_factory=>find_or_create( ls_doc_guid-value ).
            ENDIF.
            CASE ls_fields-value.
              WHEN 'update_foo'.
                lo_foo->_service( lv_message ).
                "lo_foo->save( i_commit = 'X' ).
              WHEN 'handle_save_and_commit'.
                lo_foo->save( i_commit = 'X' ).
              WHEN OTHERS.

            ENDCASE.

          CATCH cx_root.
            "Raise exception
        ENDTRY.
        """""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""""


        DATA(lv_text) = prepare_message_for_ui( 'Success' ).
        DATA(lo_msg) = cl_ac_message_type_pcp=>create( ).
        lo_msg->set_text( i_message = lv_text ).
        LOOP AT lt_fields INTO DATA(ls_field).
          IF ls_field-name NP 'pcp-*'.
            lo_msg->set_field( i_name = ls_field-name i_value = ls_field-value ).
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

        lo_producer->send( i_message = lo_msg ).
      CATCH cx_ac_message_type_pcp_error INTO DATA(lx_pcp_error).
        MESSAGE lx_pcp_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH cx_amc_error INTO DATA(lx_amc_error).
        MESSAGE lx_amc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH cx_apc_error INTO DATA(lx_apc_error).
        MESSAGE lx_apc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
      CATCH /coss/cx_api_hub INTO DATA(lx_api_hub).
        MESSAGE lx_api_hub->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD if_apc_wsp_ext_pcp~on_start.
    TRY.
* bind the WebSocket connection to the AMC channel
        DATA(lo_binding) = i_context->get_binding_manager( ).
        lo_binding->bind_amc_message_consumer(
          i_application_id = 'ZAMC_ECHO'
          i_channel_id     = '/echo' ).
      CATCH cx_apc_error INTO DATA(lx_apc_error).
        DATA(lv_message) = lx_apc_error->get_text( ).
        MESSAGE lx_apc_error->get_text( ) TYPE 'E'.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.


  METHOD prepare_message_for_ui.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF t_message,
             text TYPE string,
             user TYPE uname,
             date TYPE timestamp,
           END OF t_message.
    DATA: ls_message TYPE t_message.
    ls_message-text = iv_text.
    ls_message-user = sy-uname.
    GET TIME STAMP FIELD ls_message-date.
    DATA(lo_json_witer) = cl_sxml_string_writer=>create(
                            type = if_sxml=>co_xt_json
                          ).
    CALL TRANSFORMATION id SOURCE ls_message = ls_message
                        RESULT XML lo_json_witer.
    DATA(lv_xstr) = lo_json_witer->get_output( ).
    CALL FUNCTION 'ECATT_CONV_XSTRING_TO_STRING'
      EXPORTING
        im_xstring = lv_xstr
*       im_encoding = 'UTF-8'
      IMPORTING
        ex_string  = rv_text.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

Attempt 3 - ABAP Daemons could be used in combination with any approach that allows communication between SAPUI5 & the ABAP backend and should be able to set and retrieve instanciated objects as a Static Attribute. However, The ABAP dependency (CL_ABAP_DAEMON_EXT_BASE) to make use of ABAP Daemons is also not released for use an ABAP Cloud.

Attempt 4 - ABAP Shared memory to the rescue?  NOPE, This approach can also be used in any combination of SAPUI5 <-> ABAP Cloud communication. Similarly, the ABAP dependencies to make use of this approach are also not released for ABAP Cloud usage (CL_SHM_AREA, if_shm_build_instance & transaction SHMA objects). While this approach does work in non ABAP Cloud, a limitation I came accross is the "cx_shm_external_reference" exception which prevents you from setting an instance ref to shared memory if it has creates references to other objects. For our case of an object with many other nestest instances, this approach is not workable.

After quite some research and failed attempts... getting SAPUI5 and ABAP Cloud to work together is challenging. I think we need something like ABAP Events + SAPUI5's EventBus to communicate or a ABAP Cloud based way to use ABAP Push channels. Currently migrating to clean core with the available tools of our on-prem system feels like trying to fit a square peg into a circlular hole 😪.

ps. I am running my freestyle SAPUI5 apps on Business application studio & deploying it to the ABAP Application server. In both scenerios there is not a clear way to utilize my existing ABAP classes are part of our clean core add-on.
